summary: Specified the Publication Edge and capability policy schema as a documentation/fixture artifact. The spec defines durable edge identity, publisher/owner/surface coordinates, endpoint and event-family configuration, separate capability references, secret resolver posture, lifecycle states, preflight checks, failure states, and residual implementation tasks.

verification.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of fs.readdirSync('docs/product/fixtures/site-telemetry-publication-edge')) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('docs/product/fixtures/site-telemetry-publication-edge/'+f,'utf8')); console.log('publication edge fixtures json ok')"

residuals: No dedicated markdown/schema linter exists for this documentation-only artifact in the current package surface.
Package-level edge types/validator, local config projection, non-publishing preflight, stale/revoked credential checks, and client-helper enforcement remain implementation tasks.
